title: Behind the Scan: How PKI Secures QR Code Payments
excerpt: In this 6-minute episode of Real Time Payments Revolution, discover the hidden security mechanisms that protect your QR code payments. Learn how Public Key Infrastructure
body:
In this 6-minute episode of Real Time Payments Revolution, discover the hidden security mechanisms that protect your QR code payments. Learn how Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) ensures each transaction is authentic and secure, preventing fraud and ensuring trust in every scan. Perfect for anyone interested in the technology that keeps digital payments safe.

Listen to the latest episode of Real Time Payments Revolution here.
